label: Subagent • image source_paths routes to edit + validates sources
query: Edit an image given a source path.
notes: LIVE-ish. Proves the merged `image` tool routes to EDIT when `source_paths` is set: with a non-existent source the edit path (reached only when delegation is on and an edit model resolves) validates sources and returns `invalid_args` on field source_paths. On a host with image delegation off or no edit model it returns rejected/unavailable instead, so the generalized availability rule SKIPS it. A true edit happy-path (real source image + ready edit model) is a maintainer live-verification step, not a portable suite case.
